commentaries.author: Clement Of Rome
commentaries.content: `Moses gave you commandments according to your hard-heartedness; for from the beginning it was not so: for He who created man at first, made him male and female.'

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Because of the hardness of their hearts, and to prevent the excesses they would otherwise have committed with regard to their wives. (Bible de Vence)

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: So true, moreover, is it that divorce "was not from the beginning "that among the Romans it is not till after the six hundredth year from the building of the city that this kind of "hard-heartedness"

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
